narration: Here's what science actually says about survivorship bias.
visual_description: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about survivorship bias.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about survivorship bias.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about survivorship bias.

narration: Ever heard of the WWII plane story? Only the surviving planes were studied.
visual_description: Context visual: Ever heard of the WWII plane story? Only the surviving planes were studied.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Ever heard of the WWII plane story? Only the surviving planes were studied.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Ever heard of the WWII plane story? Only the surviving planes were studied.

narration: This leads to a critical mistake: we ignore failures. What if the lost planes held the key?
visual_description: Escalation visual: This leads to a critical mistake: we ignore failures. What if the lost planes held the key?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This leads to a critical mistake: we ignore failures. What if the lost planes held the key?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This leads to a critical mistake: we ignore failures. What if the lost planes held the key?

narration: Survivorship bias affects finance too. Investors often look at successful companies without considering the failed ones.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Survivorship bias affects finance too. Investors often look at successful companies without considering the failed ones.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Survivorship bias affects finance too. Investors often look at successful companies without considering the failed ones.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Survivorship bias affects finance too. Investors often look at successful companies without considering the failed ones.

narration: Recognizing this bias helps us make better decisions and understand risks. Don't just study survivors.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Recognizing this bias helps us make better decisions and understand risks. Don't just study survivors.
